name: Oriental Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove giblets and neck from the chicken. Rinse the chicken; pat dry.
2. Make several slits in the skin of the chicken and insert gingerroot slices.
3. Place the chicken in a Dutch oven and cover with water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer 50 minutes or until tender. Remove the chicken from the broth and reserve the broth; let cool.
4. Discard the gingerroot slices. Skin and bone the chicken and cut into ½-inch pieces.
5. Bring the reserved chicken broth to a boil; add celery and carrots and cook over high heat for 45 seconds. Drain vegetables well and rinse immediately under cold water. Drain again.
6. Cook rice noodles according to package directions; drain well.
7. In a small bowl, combine oil, soy sauce, lime juice, and garlic. Add the reserved chicken, celery, carrots, green onions, and radishes; toss gently.
8. Spoon the rice noodles onto a serving platter. Arrange the chicken mixture in the center. Chill until ready to serve.
About 245 calories per 1 cup of chicken mixture and ¼ cup of rice noodles (Fat 8.9%, Cholesterol 57).
